Without measuring HXC-pre-encoded production sweep, projecting >5pp aggregate gain would be premature.

raw_91_disclosure: Each axis is independently load-bearing on its respective corpus class. PASS 0 alone yields net-positive on n6 HXC declaration-order-variable. PASS 0.5 alone (without PASS 0) would still match canonical-to-canonical patterns successfully because both sides use a19_schema_fingerprint — but PASS 0 is needed for the dict to even contain the right fingerprints in PASS 2 scoring.
